---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in Neko Music
---

Before submitting, search [existing issues](https://github.com/mrcatlait/neko-music/issues) to avoid duplicates.

## Summary

A clear, concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- Moonrepo version:
- OS:
- Browser (if web bug):
- PostgreSQL version (if server/database bug):

## Additional Context

Logs, stack traces, screenshots, or other details that help diagnose the issue.
